# Omni-Image (O1)

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/OmniImage`
- Source API mapping path: `/src/docs/apiReference/model/OmniImage/api.ts`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/api-CDDfn45x.js`

## Endpoint IDs

- `create-omni-image`
- `query-omni-image-single`
- `query-omni-image-list`

## Endpoint Paths

- `/v1/images/omni-image`
- `/v1/images/omni-image/{id}`

```javascript
const e={title:{en:"Omni-Image (O1)",zh:"Omni-Image (O1)"},endpoints:[{id:"create-omni-image",method:"POST",path:"/v1/images/omni-image",title:{en:"Create Task",zh:"创建任务"},description:{en:"The Omni / .png",zh:"- 图片格式支持 .jpg / .jpeg / .png"},{en:"- Image file size must not exceed 10MB. Image dimensions must be at least 300px. Aspect ratio must be between 1:2.5 and 2.5:1",zh:"- 图片文件大小不能超过 10MB，图片宽高尺寸不小于 300px，图片宽高比要在 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1 之间"},{en:"- The sum of reference elements and reference images must not exceed 10",zh:"- 参考主体数量与参考图片数量有关，参考主体数量和参考图片数量之和不得超过 10"},{en:"- The value of image_url parameter must not be empty",zh:"- image_url 参数值不得为空"}],children:[{name:"image",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Image
```
